refs.description: CPython's LifoQueue in queue.py implements a thread-safe stack on top of a list with put/get following LIFO order.
The JDK's java.util.Stack class, a classic Vector-backed LIFO stack with push, pop, peek, and empty.
Redis implements LPUSH/LPOP list commands that provide stack (LIFO) semantics over its list type.
Git's revision walking uses an explicit commit stack for depth-first traversal of the commit graph.
